fields.CUSTOMER_1: Lets teams find production problems before customers are impacted.
fields.CUSTOMER_2: Reduces resolution time by linking logs, metrics, and traces.
fields.CUSTOMER_3: Improves service reliability and overall customer experience.
fields.CUSTOMER_LENS: Evaluate with incident frequency, system complexity, and visibility gaps.

fields.CUSTOMER_LENS: Evaluate with search relevance, data scale, and user experience impact.
